feature.name: Media session: add reason to enterpictureinpicture action details
feature.creator: steimel@chromium.org
feature.summary: Adds `enterPictureInPictureReason` to the `MediaSessionActionDetails` sent to the `enterpictureinpicture` action in the Media Session API. This allows developers to distinguish between `enterpictureinpicture` actions triggered explicitly by the user (e.g. from a button in the user agent) and `enterpictureinpicture` actions triggered automatically by the user agent due to the content becoming occluded.

intake.finding: ChromeStatus record (created 2025-08-14 by steimel@chromium.org). Adds `enterPictureInPictureReason` to the `MediaSessionActionDetails` sent to the `enterpictureinpicture` action in the Media Session API. This allows developers to distinguish between `enterpictureinpicture` actions triggered explicitly by the user (e.g. from a button in the user agent) and `enterpictureinpicture` actions triggered automatically by the user agent due to the content becoming occluded. Category: Miscellaneous. Blink component: Blink>Media>Session. Stars: 89.
